title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend) - Behavioral Security Products
score_reasoning: Your experience is a strong technical match for this senior role: 7 years of production Python backend systems, proven expertise with distributed systems, AWS infrastructure (S3, RDS), Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, gRPC, and comprehensive testing align very well with the must-haves. The senior level and expectations around design ownership, system reliability, and mentorship fit your profile well. Location is acceptable: remote-UK is compatible with your Berlin timezone (±1h overlap), and UK is explicitly in your target regions. However, the role focuses on ATO (Account Takeover) security products and ML-driven behavioral systems—a pivot away from your stated goal of 'deepening technical leadership in high-scale distributed microservices architectures.' This is a solid mid-size tech company role but does not advance your core trajectory in infrastructure and scale.

red_flags: Security/behavioral detection focus—domain shift from distributed systems and high-scale microservices
ML-heavy platform may require domain ramp-up outside your stated specialization
Growth potential is moderate: strong engineering environment but not your stated direction
